logo.descripcion: Logo de The Barber Collective en negro

secciones.contenido: Carrusel de imágenes mostrando el trabajo de la barbería

Haircut — $35 (30-45 min): Includes haircut, hot towel, razor neck shave, style
Kids Haircut (12 and under) — $25 (30-45 min): Haircut, style
Haircut and Beard Trim — $45 (30-45 min): Haircut, hot towel, neck shave, beard trim, style
Buzzcut — $30 (30-45 min): A haircut that only uses guards, hot towel, neck shave
Straight Razor Services — $35 (30-45 min): Straight razor shave on head or face, hot towel service razor finished beard trim
Transformation Haircut — $45 (1 hour): Haircut where 3+ months of growth will be removed, hot towel, neck shave, style
Transformation Haircut + Beard Trim — $55 (1 hour): Includes growth removal haircut, hot towel, neck shave, style, and beard trim
Full Service — $65 (1 hour): One of three options: standard haircut with face shave; head shave with facial shave or beard trim; or haircut with beard trim
The Collective Package — $100 (1.5 hours): Haircut, hot towel, neck shave, shampoo, style or head shave plus 3 additional services (face shave, beard trim, grey blending, or waxing)
Beard Trim — $25 (30-45 min): Beard shaping and trimming
Undercut with Design — $35 (30-45 min): Requires advance booking with specific barber
Shampoo — $10 (15 min)
Camo Color Grey Blending — $30 (15 min)
Waxing — $10 per area (15 min)
